parameters.query: SELECT ac.code, ac.nom, ac.setup_price, ac.monthly_price, ac.workflow_templates, t.nom_entreprise AS tenant_name FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid AND t.id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid

SELECT id, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, status FROM automation_purchases WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND automation_id = '{{ $('02. Valider donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: '[' + $('06. Preparer donnees workflow').first().json.tenantName + '] ' + $('06. Preparer donnees workflow').first().json.automationNom, nodes: [{ parameters: { rule: { interval: [{ field: 'hours', hoursInterval: 24 }] } }, id: 'schedule-node', name: 'Declencheur', type: 'n8n-nodes-base.scheduleTrigger', typeVersion: 1.2, position: [250, 300] }, { parameters: { jsCode: '// Auto: ' + $('06. Preparer donnees workflow').first().json.automationNom + ' | Client: ' + $('06. Preparer donnees workflow').first().json.tenantName + '\nreturn [{ json: { status: "ok", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];' }, id: 'code-node', name: 'Traitement', type: 'n8n-nodes-base.code', typeVersion: 2, position: [470, 300] }], connections: { Declencheur: { main: [[{ node: 'Traitement', type: 'main', index: 0 }]] } }, settings: { executionOrder: 'v1' } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids, setup_price_paid, monthly_price, config, activated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'active', '{{ $json.clientTag }}', '{{ $json.clientTag }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.allWorkflowIds) }}'::jsonb, {{ $json.setupPrice }}, {{ $json.monthlyPrice }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.config || {}) }}'::jsonb, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'active', n8n_folder_id = EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_id, n8n_folder_name = EXCLUDED.n8n_folder_name, n8n_workflow_ids = EXCLUDED.n8n_workflow_ids, config = EXCLUDED.config, activated_at = NOW(), suspended_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, status
